nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=45 beats='Otto the puppy sees the golden ladybug in the breezy meadow; it flutters past the buttercup row, past the shallow creek, and toward the meadow grass; Otto the puppy wants to follow it'>>

choices.label: Follow it to the buttercup row.
Follow it to the shallow creek.
Follow it to the meadow grass.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='the golden ladybug dances over the buttercup row where a soft, fuzzy cricket hums a happy tune; then it floats on toward the mossy stump; Otto the puppy can watch the cricket or keep following'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Otto the puppy watches the happy cricket bumble from flower to flower; when Otto the puppy looks up, the golden ladybug is gone; Otto the puppy trots back to the wooden porch, warm and glad anyway'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='at the mossy stump a little sparrow splashes and shakes bright drops in the sun; the golden ladybug rests on the rim, then drifts on toward the wild blackberries'>>

choices.label: Follow the golden ladybug to wild blackberries.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the wild blackberries hide under cool green leaves; the golden ladybug loops around them and flutters deeper into the breezy meadow toward a snug fern hollow'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='in a snug fern hollow the golden ladybug slows down and floats gently, right in front of Otto the puppy's little nose; nearby sits the acorn cap; Otto the puppy holds very still'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=40 beats='the gentle the golden ladybug lands softly right on the tip of Otto the puppy's paw; its wings open and close like two tiny blue fans; Otto the puppy giggles, still as can be, the happiest kitten in the breezy meadow'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=40 beats='beside a snug fern hollow Otto the puppy finds the acorn cap, a tiny flower crown just her size; the golden ladybug circles it once, and Otto the puppy wears the crown proudly, a sweet garden treasure'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='by the shallow creek a green toad sits on a lily pad and blinks; the golden ladybug skims over the water toward the cattails; Otto the puppy can play with the toad or follow on'>>

choices.label: Follow the golden ladybug to the cattails.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Otto the puppy and the toad play a giggly game of peekaboo around the lily pad, splish, splash, hop; by the time the game ends the golden ladybug has floated away, and Otto the puppy pads home for a cozy nap, content'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the golden ladybug weaves between the cattails; a shiny damselfly zips by like a tiny helicopter; the golden ladybug leads Otto the puppy onward toward a soft, fallen birch log'>>

choices.label: Follow past the fallen birch log.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='under the fallen birch log a small chipmunk snoozes in a ball of soft prickles; Otto the puppy steps quietly so it can sleep, and follows the golden ladybug into a shady willow nook'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe into a shady willow nook.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='in a shady willow nook Otto the puppy meets Wren, a gentle fox kit munching wild berries; the golden ladybug rests on a leaf above them, and Wren smiles a shy hello'>>

choices.label: Share the sweet berries with Wren.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=42 beats='Otto the puppy and Wren share wild blackberries that grow nearby while the golden ladybug watches from a leaf; two happy new friends, sticky little paws, and a lovely, sunny garden afternoon together'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='in the meadow grass the golden ladybug bounces up and down like a little kite; Otto the puppy can dash after it fast, or tiptoe slow and quiet through the soft green blades'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=40 beats='Otto the puppy pounces and dashes, paws thumping, so fast that the surprised the golden ladybug zips high over the garden wall; Otto the puppy cannot follow up there, so she trots back to the wooden porch, tail high and happy'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='stepping softly, Otto the puppy follows the golden ladybug under a stand of tall cornstalks; the golden ladybug floats on toward a little picket gate'>>

choices.label: Follow toward a little picket gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the golden ladybug slips through a little picket gate into a quiet rose corner, full of purple and pink blooms; Otto the puppy squeezes gently after it, whiskers twitching'>>

choices.label: Follow into a quiet rose corner.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='in a quiet rose corner a green leafy trellis curves overhead, dripping with sweet honeysuckle; the golden ladybug circles the trellis and slows, as if it is waiting just for Otto the puppy'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=42 beats='Otto the puppy sits very still beneath the flowery trellis, and the golden ladybug settles on Otto the puppy's soft ear like a little bow; they rest together in the sweet-smelling shade, calm and cozy and glad'>>
